prompt: create a retro gaming arcade cabinet selection screen with pixel art thumbnails, scanline effects, neon purple and orange color scheme, classic 8-bit font, and animated star-field background
prompt_refined: Generate a retro gaming arcade cabinet selection screen. The display should feature multiple pixel art game thumbnails and all on-screen text rendered in a classic 8-bit font. Prominent scanline effects must be overlaid across the entire screen, simulating a CRT monitor. The dominant color scheme for all user interface elements, text, and glowing accents should be neon purple and vibrant orange. A dynamic, animated star-field background should be visible behind all screen elements.
objects: Retro gaming arcade cabinet selection screen
On-screen text rendered in a classic 8-bit font
Neon purple colored UI elements, text, and accents
Vibrant orange colored UI elements, text, and accents
